name: Look Ma I Made It
description: This website is based on Babe Ruth and showcases information about his life, baseball career, achievements, and impact on the sport.

name: Underground Rap Hangman
description: This website is a hangman game with an underground rap theme, featuring artists and music references while testing the player's guessing skills.

name: Artist Gallery
description: This website is a gallery featuring some favorite music artists, including images, information, and styled layouts dedicated to each artist.

name: NJIT Movie Gallery
description: This website is a movie gallery that showcases popular movies with posters, visuals, and organized layouts for browsing different films.
